options.content:
## 🧠 AI providers
- **Claude Code / Codex** — subscription CLIs, the review brain. Health: app boot log `selfhost_ai_provider`.
- **Ollama** — embeddings (`bge-m3`) for RAG · [API root](http://localhost:11434) · `docker exec gittensory-ollama-1 ollama list`

## 🔎 Vector store (RAG)
- **Qdrant** — [Dashboard](http://localhost:6333/dashboard) · [Collections API](http://localhost:6333/collections)
- Embeddings indexed per repo; see the *RAG indexing* doc.

## ⚙️ Engine / API
- **gittensory app** — [/ ](http://localhost:8787/) · [/ready](http://localhost:8787/ready) · [/metrics](http://localhost:8787/metrics)
- Internal jobs: `POST /v1/internal/jobs/rag-index` (bearer `INTERNAL_JOB_TOKEN`)

## 💾 Data
- **SQLite** (default) at `/data/gittensory.sqlite` — surfaced here via the *GittensoryDB* datasource.
- **Postgres/pgvector** (optional `--profile postgres`).

> Links assume the default published ports on the Docker host. If you run Grafana on a remote host, replace `localhost` with that host, and publish the service `ports:` you want to reach.

## 📊 Dashboards
- **[Upstream PRs & issues (GitHub)](/d/gittensory-github)** — live, accurate census + open-PR triage (GitHub API).
- **[Reviews & PRs (maintainer)](/d/gittensory-maintainer)** — gittensory's own review activity + reviewed-PR log.
- **[Claude usage (OTEL)](/d/gittensory-claude)** — cost / tokens / model / effort from the review CLI.
- **[Gittensory (infra)](/d/gittensory)** — AI usage & cost, queue, jobs, HTTP.

## 📈 Metrics & logs
- **Prometheus** — [targets](http://localhost:9090/targets) · [graph](http://localhost:9090)
- **Alertmanager** — [alerts](http://localhost:9093)
- **Loki** — query in [Explore](/explore) (pick the *Loki* datasource), e.g. `{compose_service="gittensory"}`

## 🩺 Quick health checks
| What | Where |
|---|---|
| App serving | `GET /ready` → 200 |
| AI wired | boot log `selfhost_ai_provider` |
| Embeds wired | boot log `selfhost_embed_provider` |
| Vectors wired | boot log `selfhost_vectorize` |
| Token spend | infra dashboard → *AI Usage & Cost* |

## 📚 Docs
- `docs/self-host/` — configuration, ai-providers, rag-indexing, review-modes, troubleshooting.
